positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,negated_conjecture,
    inactive_and_disinterested(bonnie)).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    ~performs_in_school_talent_shows_often(bonnie)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~in_club(X0) | inactive_and_disinterested(X0) | performs_in_school_talent_shows_often(X0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~inactive_and_disinterested(X0) | ~in_club(X0) | chaperone_high_school_dances(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~performs_in_school_talent_shows_often(X0) | ~in_club(X0) | attends_school(X0)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~student(X0) | ~attends_school(X0) | ~in_club(X0) | ~chaperone_high_school_dances(X0)).

cnf(u34,negated_conjecture,
    chaperone_high_school_dances(bonnie)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    in_club(bonnie)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~performs_in_school_talent_shows_often(X0) | ~in_club(X0) | very_engaged_with_school_events(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define young_child_or_teenager(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define wish_to_further_academic_careers(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
